title: Run Metadata
description: Metadata logged on every traced steering inference run. Contains all fields required for reproducibility, telemetry, and the feedback loop defined in feedback-loop.md section 4.

env.description: Deployment environment, e.g. prod, staging, dev

agent.description: Agent or runtime identity producing this run, e.g. deepagentsjs

base_model.description: Base model family and size identifier used for this run

base_model_revision.description: Model revision or checkpoint date string

profile_id.description: Reference to the immutable steering profile version. Must always be present per feedback-loop.md.

vector_bundle_id.description: Reference to the trained concept vector bundle. Must always be present per feedback-loop.md.

layers.description: Actual active layers after any runtime backoff. Should reflect the layers used during inference, not just the profile default.

fallback_layer.description: Single-layer fallback from the profile, used during degraded mode

preset.description: Named intensity preset used for this run, e.g. low, medium, strong

multiplier.description: Actual steering vector magnitude applied during inference

concept.description: Concept slug identifying the steering vector applied, e.g. expense-management

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the inference request

thread_id.description: Thread or conversation identifier grouping related requests

dataset_version.description: Version identifier of the eval dataset used, if running in eval context. Optional for production inference.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the deployed steering runtime code

judge_bundle.description: Reference to the judge model/rubric bundle used for quality evaluation

degenerate.description: Post-guardrail degeneration detection result for the final response. True if repetition, collapse, or incoherent output was detected.

language_shift.description: Whether unintended language drift was detected in the response
